meta.title: MDC Hunt Calendar — 2026–27 Season Data
meta.disclaimer: Not a legal document. Regulations can change. Verify at mdc.mo.gov and in the MDC 2026 Fall Deer & Turkey Hunting Regulations booklet before hunting.

data_classes.regulation: Officially set by MDC / Missouri Conservation Commission; source and verification date required.
data_classes.model: Computed (moon, sun, rut estimates); method noted; not regulatory.
data_classes.personal: User-entered scouting/log data; stored locally in browser.

bear_management_zone.basis: Jefferson County lies east of MO-47 and south of the Missouri River, inside the BMZ 2 boundary (north from the Arkansas border on US-63 to I-44; east on I-44 to MO-47; north on MO-47 to the Missouri River; east along the river to the Illinois border).

seasons.name: Archery Deer
seasons.notes: Statewide. Only one antlered deer may be taken before the November firearms portion.

seasons.name: Firearms Early Antlerless
seasons.notes: Open counties only. VERIFY Jefferson County is open in the 2026 Fall booklet (expected July 2026).

seasons.name: Firearms Early Youth
seasons.notes: Ages 6–15. Moved one week earlier in 2026 under the new Halloween-overlap rule.

seasons.name: Firearms November Portion
seasons.notes: Main firearms portion. One antlered deer during entire firearms season. Hunter orange required.

seasons.name: Firearms Late Antlerless
seasons.notes: Open counties only. VERIFY Jefferson County is open in the 2026 Fall booklet.

seasons.name: Firearms Alternative Methods
seasons.notes: Muzzleloaders, cap-and-ball, centerfire handguns, air-powered firearms, bows, atlatls.

seasons.name: Black Bear (BMZ 2)
seasons.notes: Resident draw-permit holders only, zone-specific. Season closes early in a BMZ if its harvest quota is reached (statewide: 2,000 permits, 60-bear quota). Lone bears only; no sows with cubs; no denned bears; no bait; no dogs; hunter orange required.

daily_requirement.action: Call 800-668-4045 before hunting each day to check quota/closure status.

post_harvest: Present bear at designated MDC check station
Submit premolar tooth to MDC Furbearer Program within 10 days

removed_in_2026.detail: Zone concept removed for 2026-27; county-specific rules remain (see advisories).

removed_in_2026.item: CWD Portion of firearms deer season
removed_in_2026.detail: Eliminated; do not render a CWD/antlerless-CWD layer.

advisories.title: CWD sampling — Jefferson County
advisories.detail: In 2025, Jefferson County was NOT a mandatory sampling county (voluntary sampling encouraged); St. Louis and St. Charles were mandatory. The 2026 designated-county list publishes in the July Fall booklet — re-verify before rendering any compliance language.

advisories.title: Feed and mineral placement prohibited
advisories.detail: Placing grain, salt, minerals, or other consumables to attract deer is prohibited year-round in counties with a CWD detection or within 10 miles of one. Jefferson County has CWD history — treat the ban as in effect.

advisories.title: Deer Telecheck deadline
advisories.detail: Telecheck by 10 p.m. on day of harvest via MO Hunting app, mdc.mo.gov, or 1-866-227-2564. Confirm exact wording against the 2026 Fall booklet.

reminders.title: Apply for 2027 black bear permit draw
reminders.detail: Missouri residents apply during May at mdc.mo.gov/buypermits; drawing results ~July 1. Shown to all users regardless of permit status.

reminders.title: Verify against 2026 Fall Deer & Turkey booklet
reminders.detail: Confirm: antlerless open-county status for Jefferson, 2026 mandatory CWD sampling counties/days, Telecheck wording, managed-hunt dates.

rut.method: Regional whitetail rut pattern for east-central Missouri; peak estimated Nov 6–15 ±5 days. Heuristic, not MDC data.

moon.method: Astronomical phase algorithm as in existing app.
